case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. TANIA YURIDIA BENAVIDEZ VARELA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-07-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-07-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC REPRESENTATIVE MARICRUZ CEDANO. NO APPEARANCE BY THE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL, CLERK J. RUMSEY, NOT REPORTED. (506)
